SHORT NAME: ALPTHC_OSTPTHC_PHYSN_TXNMY_IND 
LONG NAME: ALPTHC_OSTPTHC_PHYSN_TXNMY_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
202C00000X: Independent medical examiner 
202D00000X: Integrative medicine physician 
202K00000X: Phlebology 
204C00000X: Neuromusculoskeletal medicine, sports medicine
